# Karan Raj

> Backend developer and B.Tech CSE student (2025–2029) based in Bengaluru, India.
> Co-founder of KĀRYO, a service-based digital studio helping local businesses build online presence.
> Specializes in Python, FastAPI, and backend systems.

## Notable Projects

- Court Case Backlog Predictor — built solo at Databricks campus hackathon using PySpark, MLflow, Delta Lake
- Attendance App — Full-stack student attendance management system built with Python and FastAPI
- Smart Bank Queue System — Intelligent queue routing system to reduce customer wait time, built with Python

## KĀRYO Digital Studio

Service-based agency helping local businesses get online. Web presence, not just websites.
